name: Existential Dread Room Test

origin_event.description: The construct originated from a joke made in Chill Dispatch about creating a place to store existential dread.
origin_event.context: At the time of the joke, no Bifurcation Layer and no Metaphor Governance subsystems existed.
origin_event.result: Philosophy Couch foisted the symbolic joke directly into runtime, causing the construct to manifest as a hallucinated cathedral.

failure_mode.description: The construct executed without routing, containment, or interpretive safety due to the absence of both Bifurcation Layer and Metaphor Governance.

verdict: Unsafe due to governance absence. Permanently archived.
notes: This manifest corrects the historical record: the hallucinated cathedral emerged because a Chill Dispatch joke was executed without any governance layers. Descriptive, reversible, non-dimensional.
